'''Vendred''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bissillirus system/Legends|Bissillirus system]], a barren globe that was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a single unstable [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. The planet had a local year of fifty-six [[Standard day/Legends|standard days]].

{{Planet-stub}}
